title: Packet 014 Artifact Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the Packet 014 host-created handoff and the minimal related post-014 authority-state surfaces through `C:/APEX Platform`, excluding unrelated `.vercelignore`, then fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting governing commit so publication hygiene is restored before any later second bounded host-side trial is considered.
dependency_note: Packet 015 concluded that publication should happen now before any second bounded host-side documentation/planning trial, because the unresolved issue after Packet 014 is publication hygiene rather than host-edit viability. This packet exists to publish the Packet 014 host-created handoff and restore host mirror parity without widening scope.
required_inputs: The Packet 015 ruling that Packet 014's host-created handoff should be published before any second host-side trial
The Packet 014 execution handoff and the minimal related Packet 014 or Packet 015 authority-state surfaces selected for publication
The current workstation parent-root state at `C:/APEX Platform`, including unrelated `.vercelignore` that must be excluded
The current prepared host mirror state at `/home/olares/code/apex` on `clean-main` at `16fe398bfcd74a8cace69fcadeb0193e43f28558`, with the Packet 014 handoff as the only host-side untracked artifact
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the bounded publication scope, resulting governing commit, and post-sync host-mirror evidence for the Packet 014 artifact publication lane
A recorded statement of whether the host mirror is clean again and current enough for a later second bounded host-side documentation/planning trial to be considered
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm the proposed publication scope is limited to the Packet 014 handoff plus the minimal related Packet 014 or Packet 015 authority-state surfaces only.
Exclude unrelated `.vercelignore`, secrets, runtime artifacts, host-only state, service configuration changes, implementation work outside this authority-publication lane, and any old-clone content.
Create and publish the bounded parent-root commit to the GitHub-canonical repository, recording branch, remote, included paths, and resulting commit hash.
Capture pre-sync `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, remote, commit, and cleanliness evidence without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit using a non-destructive fast-forward-only method.
Capture post-sync evidence that the host mirror is clean again and now contains the Packet 014 execution handoff plus the included post-014 authority-state artifacts.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting change, or inclusion of unrelated parent-root changes in the publication commit.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes bounded parent-root publication and fast-forward-only host mirror synchronization only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as a bounded parent-root publication and host-mirror resync gate. The Packet 014 host-created handoff and minimal post-014 authority surfaces were committed and pushed in `8be69f166a0ac738304d178e9443166852e4ee7f`, `.vercelignore` remained excluded, `/home/olares/code/apex` fast-forwarded cleanly to that commit, the byte-identical untracked Packet 014 handoff was replaced by the tracked published copy without force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, or old-clone mutation, and the host mirror is clean again.
next_action: A later second bounded host-side documentation/planning trial may be considered as a separate packet if desired. Do not treat Packet 016 as migration approval or as authorization for runtime mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting work, canonical-hosting change, remote rewrite, or old-clone cleanup.
